text:
The Holy Grail (聖杯, Seihai) is a rare artifact found in Midonite. Hunter × Hunter: Altar of Dragon Vein 

Item Description

A cup that would have been used for some ritual.

Plot

Altar of Dragon Vein

The Holy Grail is one of the four rare artifacts that Ruins Hunter Satotz requests for his sidequest.
